standing.modalDescription: Standing Companies persist across sessions, appear in the dedicated Standing section of the library, and carry a permanent visual badge.
standing.optIn1: I understand this team will be marked as a Standing Company across the app.
standing.optIn2: I can demote this team back to a regular team at any time.

group.standingHint: {{count}} - persistent, ritualized orgs that run continuously
group.teamsHint: {{count}} - ad-hoc squads for a specific outcome. Spawn, ship, dissolve.

launcher.buildMyOwnSubtitle: Pick a leader, add teammates, choose backends. Save and reuse as your own template later.
launcher.namePlaceholder: e.g. Launch Sprint, Renewal Push, Q1 Brand Refresh
launcher.rosterTip: Tip - leaving teammates empty makes this a solo-leader team.
launcher.pickLeader: Pick a specialist as team leader…
launcher.goalLabel: Describe what you're doing - I'll suggest a roster
launcher.goalPlaceholder: e.g. We're launching a paid book funnel and need a small team to ship it in two weeks.
launcher.suggestFellBackToDefaults: Picked a default roster (no goal keywords matched)

rightRail.workspaceLinked: Browse files in the workspace panel →
rightRail.workspaceEmpty: No workspace bound to this team yet.
rightRail.ritualsEmpty: No rituals - not a Standing Company.

import.title: Review team capabilities
import.intro: This team declares the following capabilities. Grant only what you trust.
import.missingSpecialists: Missing specialists: {{names}}. Install them first or use a different team.
import.networkNotice: Network access for imported teams is currently disabled. This capability cannot be granted in v1.
import.busyError: Import queue full - try again in a few seconds

cap.canReadFilesDesc: Grants this team's agents read access to files within your workspace folder. The .env, .ssh, and node_modules/.bin/.cache directories are always blocked.
cap.canWriteFilesDesc: Grants write + mkdir access within your workspace. Symlinks are always blocked. Protected paths always denied.
cap.canSpawnAgentsDesc: Allows the leader to grow the roster at runtime via team_spawn_agent.
cap.canNetworkRequestDesc: Allows fetch/https.request calls from agent processes.
cap.canCrossTeamMessageDesc: Allows team_send_message to deliver to teams outside this one.
